headline: Octave Specialty (OSG) Soars 8.5%: Is Further Upside Left in the Stock?
summary: Octave Specialty (OSG) saw its shares surge in the last session with trading volume being higher than average. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions may not translate into further price increase in the near term.
